description:
An easy problem that comes from a game on KGS. White made a mistake and loses his entire group. Problem updated : Kill white whithout a Ko.
Thanks for the corrections.

A mistake.How should Black take advantage of it whitout playing a Ko ?]AB[nm]AW[jq]AB[dk]AP[goproblems]
(;B[kp];W[ko]
(;B[lo]C[No, this shape creates a Ko and it is possible to prevent it by playing differently.])
(;B[jp];W[jo]C[];B[lo]C[No, playing like this leads to a Ko and it is possible to prevent it by playing differently.])
(;B[nn];W[jp];B[lo]C[];W[mr]C[This sequence is the best. M2 and M3 are threatened but it is possible to save them thanks to the Ko at M4.RIGHT])
(;B[jo];W[jp];B[nn];W[kp];B[lo]C[];W[mr]C[Yes it is correct but with this solution White has a chance to kill M2,M3.RIGHT]))
(;B[ko];W[kp];B[lo];W[mr]C[That's it but with this sequence White has a chance to kill M2,M3.RIGHT])
